items.name: AIBrix
items.description: Cost-efficient and pluggable Infrastructure components for GenAI inference.

items.name: Arks
items.description: Arks is an end-to-end framework for managing LLM-based applications within Kubernetes cluster. It provides a robust and extensible infrastructure tailored for deploying, orchestrating, and scaling LLM inference workloads in cloud-native environments.

items.name: KAITO
items.description: Kubernetes AI Toolchain Operator (KAITO) simplifies LLM inference, tuning, and RAG workloads on Kubernetes.

items.name: KServe
items.description: Standardized Distributed Generative and Predictive AI Inference Platform for Scalable, Multi-Framework Deployment on Kubernetes

items.name: llm-d
items.description: a Kubernetes-native high-performance distributed LLM inference framework.

items.name: llmaz
items.description: Easy, advanced inference platform for large language models on Kubernetes.

items.name: RBG
items.description: Kubernetes API for orchestrating distributed, stateful AI inference workloads with multi-role collaboration and built-in service discovery.
